config.title: Berlin Public Transport Ferries - FAQ
config.subtitle: Quick answers for tourists choosing a BVG ferry, ticket or boat-tour alternative.

items.q: Are Berlin public transport ferries included in BVG tickets?
items.a: Most BVG ferry lines can be used with a valid Berlin public transport ticket for the right fare zone. They are part of the public transport network, but you should still check the current line page before leaving.

items.q: Which Berlin public transport ferry is best for tourists?
items.a: For most first-time visitors, F10 from S Wannsee to Alt-Kladow is the best Berlin public transport ferry. It is scenic, easy to understand and long enough to feel like a real water crossing.

items.q: Is the F10 ferry in Berlin worth it?
items.a: Yes, if you can give it a slower west-Berlin afternoon. It is not a quick central landmark cruise, but it is a good cheap boat ride with a lake and Havel feeling.

items.q: Can I use a short-trip ticket on the F10 ferry?
items.a: No. The current official F10 timetable says the short-trip fare does not apply on F10. Use a normal valid ticket or day ticket for the correct fare zone.

items.q: Do Berlin public transport ferries run all year?
items.a: F10, F11 and F12 have regular winter and summer timetables. F21, F23 and F24 are seasonal in the current 2026 BVG PDFs, so check the exact route and date before you travel.

items.q: Can I take a bike on Berlin public transport ferries?
items.a: Sometimes, but do not treat it as guaranteed. BVG says bicycles need a valid bicycle fare unless you are exempt, and carriage depends on space and staff decisions.

items.q: Should I take a BVG ferry or a tourist boat tour?
items.a: Take a BVG ferry if you want a cheap local water crossing. Take a tourist boat tour if you want central landmarks, commentary and a route designed around sightseeing.

items.q: Can I combine a Berlin public transport ferry with BerlinWalk?
items.a: Yes. BerlinWalk lasts about 2 hours in the historic centre, so F10 can work as a slower afternoon plan after the tour if you still have energy for a west-Berlin water trip.
